info.title: Web Page to Markdown
info.description: This API converts web pages into Markdown format. Users can provide a URL, and the service retrieves the webpage content, formatting it as Markdown for easier readability and integration in Markdown-compatible systems.

get.description: Downloads a requested web page and outputs a markdown version. Optionally includes title, suppresses links, or disables cleaning/filtering.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the webpage to convert to Markdown

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Include the page title as a heading in the Markdown output. Title is also returned in the X-Title HTTP header.

parameters.name: links
parameters.description: Whether to include links in the Markdown output

parameters.name: clean
parameters.description: Whether to clean/filter content before conversion. When false, output will be more verbose but may have more junk or artefacts.

X-Title.description: URL-encoded title of the converted webpage (when title parameter is true)

schema.description: The webpage content converted to Markdown format

text/plain.example:
# Firefox - Protect your life online with privacy-first products — Mozilla (UK)

Meet our family of products
---------------------------

* [![](https://www.mozilla.org/media/protocol/img/logos/firefox/browser/logo.eb1324e44442.svg) ...

400.description: Bad request - invalid URL or parameters

500.description: Internal server error - failed to process the webpage

post.description: Alternative POST request that allows supplying both URL and HTML content in the POST body for conversion to Markdown.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Include the page title as a heading in the Markdown output. Title is also returned in the X-Title HTTP header.

parameters.name: links
parameters.description: Whether to include links in the Markdown output

parameters.name: clean
parameters.description: Whether to clean/filter content before conversion. When false, output will be more verbose but may have more junk or artefacts.

requestBody.description: Form data containing the URL and optionally the HTML content to convert

url.description: The URL of the webpage being converted

html.description: The HTML content to convert to Markdown (optional - if provided, this HTML will be used instead of fetching from the URL)

X-Title.description: URL-encoded title of the converted webpage (when title parameter is true)

schema.description: The webpage content converted to Markdown format

text/plain.example:
# Firefox - Protect your life online with privacy-first products — Mozilla (UK)

Meet our family of products
---------------------------

* [![](https://www.mozilla.org/media/protocol/img/logos/firefox/browser/logo.eb1324e44442.svg) ...

400.description: Bad request - invalid URL, HTML, or parameters

500.description: Internal server error - failed to process the webpage
